heading: edgeGram
body:
The `edgeGram` tokenizer tokenizes input from the left side, or
"edge", of a text input into n-grams of given sizes. You can't use a
custom analyzer with [edgeGram](edgeGram-tokenizer-ref) tokenizer
in the `analyzer` field for [Synonym](synonyms-ref) or
[tokenization](bson-data-types-autocomplete) [Define Field Mappings](fts-field-mappings).
